per_example.text: What You Bring University degree (Master’s or PhD) in computer science, robotics, electrical engineering, or related field. 5+ years in robotics or applied ML with production deployments in manipulation or mobile robotics. Deep expertise in foundation models, specifically, multimodal, reasoning and vision-language-action models, diffusion models, and modern finetuning methods (PEFT, DPO, RLHF). Strong programming skills in Python and C++ and experience with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch or JAX, CUDA). Hands-on experience with industrial or research robots and simulators (e.g., ROS 2, Isaac Sim, MuJoCo); knowledge of kinematics, motion planning, and control. Publications, patents, or open-source contributions are a plus.

Um für deinen Weg gewappnet zu sein, hast du folgende Qualifikationen im Gepäck: Abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Data Science, Mathematik, Statistik oder einem vergleichbaren Bereich mit mindestens 4 Jahren Berufserfahrung – idealerweise im Consulting oder in Projekten im Data Science, ML- oder KI-Umfeld Leidenschaft für Daten, AI und Generative AI sowie Begeisterung für deren strategischen Mehrwert für das Business Expertise in Python, SQL, ETL-Prozessen, RAG, ML/DL, LLMs, Pandas und NumPy Deine Arbeitsweise ist geprägt von Eigenverantwortung, Zielorientierung, Teamfähigkeit und Hands-on-Mentalität

At least 7 years of professional experience in Data Science, NLP, Machine Learning, or Generative AI, ideally in a consulting or project-based environment Proven expertise in the design and production deployment of NLP- and LLM-based systems Strong hands-on experience with tools and methods such as: LLM APIs and agent frameworks Vector databases and retrieval-based approaches Evaluation methods for GenAI systems Very good knowledge of modern ML frameworks (e.g. PyTorch ) and experience with fine-tuning, post-training, and inference optimisation Ability to develop clean, scalable, and performant production code Experience with cloud-based architectures and MLOps / deployment workflows on platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP Confident client-facing presence and the ability to communicate complex technical topics clearly Structured, proactive, and independent working style, even in complex environments Very good German and English skills (C1 level or higher)

gliner_spans.text: Very good German and English skills
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: Degree in the field of information technology, computer science or comparable Minimum of 5 years professional experience in Full Stack development, with proven expertise in React and TypeScript Minimum of 3 years of proficiency in at least one Cloud Services Provider Monorepo architectures and tooling (Turborepo) knowledge is desirable Minimum of 1 of relevant experience with NestJS Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and DevOps best practices

What You Bring A completed degree (Business Administration, Business Informatics, Data Science, etc.) or comparable skills. You think analytically and enjoy solving business problems with technology. You’re familiar with Python as well as pandas, scikit-learn and/or LLMs. ETL pipelines and agentic concepts are not new to you. Big data, data analytics, and process mining make your heart beat faster. You’re communicative, curious, and want to grow with others. German and English? Of course — at least C1 level. Ideally, you’re located near Munich or Nuremberg and willing to work onsite with your team two days a week. Nice to have: Experience with ERP systems (SAP, Dynamics, Oracle) and SQL skills.

DEIN PROFIL Akademischer Hintergrund: Erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Studium in der Fachrichtung Informatik, Wirtschaftsinformatik oder ein vergleichbares Studium mit relevantem Bezug Berufserfahrung: Mindestens zwei Jahre einschlägige Berufserfahrung mit ausgeprägtem ML-Hintergrund und Erfahrung in der Erstellung, Bereitstellung und Pflege von ML-Modellen in der Produktion Technische Fähigkeiten: Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse in Python und den gängigen Machine Learning-Bibliotheken sowie Erfahrungen mit MLOps-Tools wie MLflow, KubeFlow o.ä. Zusatzkenntnisse: Von Vorteil sind Erfahrungen im Umgang mit großen Datenmengen sowie im Einsatz von Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM). Teamfähigkeit und Innovationsfreude: Spaß an der Arbeit in einem agilen Team, "Out of the box"-Denken und hohes Interesse daran, sich mit neuen Themen auseinanderzusetzen Sprachkenntnisse: Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse

You should have an excellent command of English, both written and spoken, and be able to communicate in German at around A2 level. A successfully completed degree in Computer Science (or a related field), or a completed IT-related vocational training that provides an equivalent level of knowledge. Very good skills in software development with at least one high-level programming language (e.g. Python, Java, Scala or similar) Ideally, experience with Unity Catalogue, Asset Bundles, workspace creation, MLflow, Lakebase Good knowledge of SQL & databases and experience with relational databases (e.g. HANA, MS SQL, MySQL ) Advanced knowledge of Linux / operating systems , including configuration, usage and troubleshooting Strong analytical skills and the ability to solve problems independently You enjoy working independently and responsibly within a team structure You have good communication and presentation skills and are able to convey technical concepts appropriately to different target audiences At least 2 years of experience in Machine Learning Engineering on Databricks Experience in building efficient and scalable Big Data and Data Science projects Experience in the productive operation of ML/Data services Experience in process optimization , improving standard processes and best practices Experience in developing clean, maintainable and efficient code according to best practices, including unit testing and debugging Experience working in cross-functional teams

Python oder R - Erfahrung im Umgang mit gängigen BI-Tools (Power BI, Tableau) - Erfahrung in der methodischen Datenaufbereitung (ETL) und im strukturierten Anforderungsmanagement - AI-Erfahrung als Data Analytics Consultant - Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Statistik, Betriebswirtschaft, Ökonometrie, Mathematik oder Informatik oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation - Relevante Erfahrung in den Bereichen Datenanalyse oder Business Intelligence - Sichere Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift

Qualifications: - Master’s student or Gap Year between Bachelor and Master (CS, Physics, Math, or similar) - Strong skills in Python - ML frameworks ( PyTorch, scikit-learn, TensorFlow ) and APIs ( PostgREST / Supabase REST APIs ) - Solid software engineering and data automation skills - Familiarity with Pipedream, LangChain, Hugging Face, or Streamlit - Quantitative mindset and a passion for startups and venture capital - Good command of both German and English

per_example.text: What Kind of Person We Are Looking For: Proficiency in Python and C++ for algorithm development and deployment. 2+ years of experience in machine learning (NNs, LVMs, VLAs) and reinforcement learning applied to robotics or similar real-time environments. Hands-on experience with physics simulation environments (e.g., MuJoCo, Isaac Lab). Experience with deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow). Strong understanding of classical and modern control theory, locomotion dynamics, etc. Experience working with physical robots. Contributions to open-source ML or robotics projects. M.Sc. or Ph.D. in Robotics, Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, or a related field. Publication record in the field.

Qualifikationen - Bachelor’s degree (7+ years of experience), Master’s degree (5+ years of experience) or Ph.D. degree (0-2 years of experience) in life sciences, medicine, pharmacy, bioinformatics, biomedical/clinical data science or related field. - Solid scientific domain knowledge in late-stage pharmaceutical development, including Medical Affairs, Clinical Development, Pharmacovigilance, Health Economics & Outcomes Research (HEOR), or Epidemiology, shown through education or work experience. - Proficiency in Python is required and experience in front-end technologies (HTML, JavaScript, CSS, React) as well as basic working experience with Linux/Unix-based OS or Docker is a plus. - Competence in using GenAI models for knowledge extraction as well as basic understanding of agents and agentic workflows (MCP, A2A). - Experience in analyzing publications, especially literature, is essential. Ideally also experience with drug pipeline or trial CI databases (e.g. Clarivate’s Cortellis Competitive Intelligence, Citeline’s Trialtrove or Pharmaprojects). - Strong analytical skills to process, analyze, visualize, and present results to variety of audiences. Knowledge of common technologies and formats for retrieval, analysis and visualization of complex data. Experience using relational databases and SQL (Oracle, Apache Hadoop). - Systematic problem-solving mind, quick learner and superior attention to detail in developing tailored solutions, high degree of reliability and integrity. - Ability in working cross-functionally and in inter-disciplinary teams, while communicating effectively, both verbally and in writing, with scientists and non-scientists. Comfortable in a fast paced work environment with constantly shifting priorities. - Innate scientific curiosity, technical creativity, and innovative thinking. Motivated to break new ground in the field of information analysis and insights generation. - Excellent written and oral English language skills as well as the openness to travel (10%).

gliner_spans.text: Excellent written and oral English language skills
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: What You’ll Do As a Machine Learning Engineer III on the Routing Cost team, you will lead the design, development, and delivery of highly trafficked recommendation systems for our routing cost engine. Your technical contributions will include: Lead the engineering team(s) to execute end-to-end feature implementation within the larger navigation organization (~80 engineers). Design and build new ML and data pipelines, as well as optimizing existing ML and data pipelines. Build tools for automated quality assurance and data exploration. Leverage geospatial algorithms to optimize pipelines, as well as creating automated tuning and outlier detection algorithms. Partner with data scientists to make improvements to our models for determining patterns in movement and/or traffic. Mentor colleagues and participate in code and design reviews. Participate in an on-call rotation to ensure our systems remain available to customers 24/7. Team members alternate as the on-call primary responder, which may require immediate response outside normal working hours, including weekends. What We Believe Are Important Traits For This Role 8-10+ years of backend and ML experience: Extensive hands-on experience showcasing expertise and a strong track record in the engineering field. Technical knowledge: Extensive experience with Python, distributed processing pipelines (Hadoop, Spark, Airflow, Dask), and very large datasets – statistical analysis, data quality control, optimizing storage. Cloud proficiency: Extensive experience with cloud and infrastructure services, including, as well as deploying and managing infrastructure in cloud environments. Operational excellence: You drive a culture of quality and continuous improvement in your organization. Strong passion for clean code and robust architecture, with a drive to elevate engineering practices and design standards across the team. Ownership & execution: Own the technical vision, lead the strategy and guide the team to execute towards building the future of our routing cost engine. Customer focus: You care deeply about your customers and their problems, and you work tirelessly to innovate on their behalf. Growth mindset: Have the humility to accept mistakes, learn and grow from them. Mentorship: Experience mentoring and leading engineering teams developing skill sets and career growth. Strong written and vocal communication skills: You can talk and write about

DEIN PROFIL Begeisterung für Daten: Mit viel Begeisterung eignest du dir gerne neues Wissen zu Applikationen, Technologien und Tools im Analytics Kontext an. Bildung und Erfahrung: Du verfügst über ein abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik oder eine vergleichbare Ausbildung und idealerweise Praxiserfahrung im Consulting. Projektleitungskompetenz: Du hast ein hohes Eigenvertrauen in deine Fähigkeiten als Projektleitung, denkst kundenorientiert und begeisterst das Projektteam. Kommunikationsfähigkeiten: Durch deine Erfahrung und Persönlichkeit hast du Spaß an der Koordination komplexer Situationen und repräsentierst das Thema mit Begeisterung. Sprachkenntnisse: Deine sehr guten Deutsch- und guten Englischkenntnisse ermöglichen dir eine sichere Kommunikation.

Degree in Bio-Chemical Engineering or Natural Sciences (Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Chemistry, Physics, etc.) with strong data science experience Or a Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics or a related field 3+ years' experience in data analytics, ML/AI applications and process development in biotech or related industries Proven track record in managing complex, data-driven projects and cross-functional collaboration

Proven leadership experience with 3+ years managing machine learning or software engineering teams, ideally across multiple locations, with a track record of building high-performing teams Strategic technical vision with experience leading complex, multi-stakeholder ML/data science initiatives from concept to production Deep ML and cloud expertise including hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks, MLOps practices, and AWS cloud services Production ML deployment experience with real-world examples of deploying and maintaining large-scale ML systems in production environments Bridge-builder mindset with exceptional communication skills, ability to translate between technical and business stakeholders, and talent for building consensus across diverse teams Hands-on technical credibility with the ability to review architectures, guide technical decisions, and occasionally contribute to critical implementations

gliner_spans.text: ability to translate between technical and business stakeholders
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: **Key Skills And Experience** You should have proven experience in conducting research, abilities to work hands-on to develop software, analyze computer systems, strong presentation and communication skills, courage to take initiative and to drive progress. Strong background in AI: Expertise in machine learning, deep learning, Gen AI. Systems experience: Distributed processing, storage solutions, edge systems, performance analysis, and workload orchestration Programming skills: Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python, R, Go, etc.) and familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, etc.), experience in Agentic AI and frameworks (AutoGen, LangChain, etc.) Excellent communication skills: Ability to clearly communicate research findings and technical concepts in written and oral presentations. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: Ability to identify and analyze complex problems, develop innovative solutions, and evaluate their effectiveness. Self-motivation and initiative: Ability to work independently and take ownership of research tasks. Published research in reputable conferences and journals demonstrating scholarly contribution.

Profil - Laufendes Studium z.B. eines MINT-Fachs oder Sportwissenschaften, gerne Data Science - Pflichtpraktikum mit Dauer von mindestens 18 Wochen - selbstständige und sorgfältige Arbeitsweise, technisches Verständnis - sehr gute Englischkenntnisse, Deutsch wünschenswert - Programmiererfahrung mit Python ist wünschenswert, aber nicht notwendig

Anforderungen Sie zeichnen sich durch detaillierte unternehmensspezifische Kenntnisse oder außergewöhnliche Spezialkenntnisse sowie Fähigkeiten aus: Maschinelles Lernen (Machine Learning), Statistische Modellierung, Teamführung und Mentoring Sehr gute Erfahrungen in klassischen und agilen Kooperationsformen Hervorragende Erfahrungen in der Leitung von strategisch ausgerichteten Projekten Sehr gute Kenntnisse in der Umsetzung von AI Use Cases Sehr gutes Technologieverständnis Tiefgehende, umfangreiche Erfahrung in der statistischen Analyse und statistischen Messungen Hervorragende Kenntnisse in der logischen Datenmodellierung Hervorragende Kenntnisse in komplexen Big Data Architekturen Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Deutsch (C1) und gute Kenntnisse in Englisch (min.B2)

gliner_spans.text: Hervorragende Kenntnisse in komplexen Big Data Architekturen
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: An advanced degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related computationally focused science degree (or equivalent experience). You have 8+ years of relevant experience in software development or research work. Programming fluency in C/C++ with a deep understanding of algorithms and software development. A background that includes parallel programming, e.g., CUDA, OpenACC, OpenMP, MPI, pthreads, etc. Hands on experience doing low-level performance optimizations. In-depth expertise with CPU and GPU architecture fundamentals. Effective communication and organization skills, with a logical approach to problem solving, good time management, and prioritization skills. Expertise in parallelization and performance optimization of Deep Learning models arising from Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Recommender Systems, etc. Excellent understanding of linear algebra.

Bereiche, in denen wir Talente suchen: Softwareentwicklung : Entwurf, Implementierung und Wartung von Anwendungen, Systemen und Webplattformen für verschiedenste Anwendungen. Cloud Computing : Mitwirkung an der Entwicklung und Optimierung von Cloud-Infrastrukturen und -Diensten für skalierbare, flexible Lösungen. Künstliche Intelligenz und Machine Learning : Entwicklung intelligenter Systeme, die auf großen Datenmengen basieren, um innovative Lösungen zu schaffen. Cybersecurity : Arbeit an der Sicherstellung der IT-Sicherheit durch Entwicklung von Schutzsystemen und Identifizierung von Bedrohungen. Big Data und Data Science : Nutzung von Datenanalyse, Datenbanken und modernen Analysetools, um wertvolle Erkenntnisse zu gewinnen und Geschäftsprozesse zu optimieren. Mobile App-Entwicklung : Design und Entwicklung von benutzerfreundlichen und leistungsstarken Apps für Android und iOS. DevOps und IT-Infrastruktur : Mitwirkung an der Automatisierung und Optimierung von Softwarebereitstellung und Infrastrukturen. Agile Softwareentwicklung : Anwendung von agilen Methoden (wie Scrum oder Kanban) zur effizienten und flexiblen Entwicklung von Softwareprojekten. Wer wir suchen: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung oder Studium in einem relevanten Bereich (z.B. Informatik, Software Engineering, Wirtschaftsinformatik). Begeisterung für Technologie, Programmierung und die Entwicklung innovativer IT-Lösungen. Teamfähigkeit und eine lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise. Idealerweise Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung oder verwandten Bereichen, aber auch Quereinsteiger*innen mit entsprechenden Qualifikationen sind willkommen.

Abgeschlossenes Studium (Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Data Science o.ä.) oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation mit mehrjähriger Berufserfahrung im relevanten Umfeld (z.B. als IT-Consultant, Software Engineer, Data Scientist). Verfügst über ein abgeschlossenes Studium (Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Data Science o.ä.) oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation mit mehrjähriger Berufserfahrung im relevanten Umfeld (z.B. als IT-Consultant, Software Engineer, Data Scientist). Verstehst die Schnittstelle zwischen IT und Business und kannst sowohl technische Tiefe als auch prozessuales Verständnis vermitteln. Bringt idealerweise Erfahrung im Mentoring, Coaching oder der Ausbildung von Nachwuchskräften mit und hast Spaß an pädagogischen Fragestellungen. Besitzt idealerweise bereits einen AdA-Schein (Ausbildereignung nach AEVO) oder bist bereit, diesen zeitnah zu erwerben. Bist vertraut mit modernen Tech-Stacks und Methoden (z.B. Python, SQL, Cloud-Services, agile Methoden) und hast eine Affinität zu aktuellen Entwicklungen wie z.B. KI. Dank Deiner analytischen Denkfähigkeit und Deines "Growth Mindsets" treibst Du proaktiv die Entwicklung der Studierenden voran und ermutigst sie, die Komfortzone zu verlassen. Bist ein/e Teamplayer/in, der/die standortübergreifende Zusammenarbeit schätzt. Sprichst fließend Englisch und Deutsch und verfügst über ausgezeichnete kommunikative Fähigkeiten, um komplexe technische Zusammenhänge verständlich zu vermitteln und Stakeholder zu begeistern.

Here are the extracted requirements: 4+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance or engineering, with a strong focus on scalable web applications (7+years for Sr. QA Engineer). Strong grasp of QA architecture and modern testing methodologies. Deep expertise in the tech stack used by our engineers, specifically TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, and PySpark. Cloud & Database Proficiency: Familiarity with AWS services and both SQL and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB) databases to effectively test data persistence and performance. Global Collaboration: Ability to work effectively with globally distributed teams Native or Business-level proficiency in written and spoken English Strong plus if you also have: AI/ML Literacy: Understanding of Machine Learning (Supervised/Reinforcement Learning), Predictive AI, and the validation of Data Pipelines. Proficiency in Python or experience with PySpark. Prior experience in the e-commerce or Ad Tech ecosystem (DSPs, Audience Data, Fraud detection).

Your Profile Master’s degree in computer science, data engineering, mathematics or a related field 5+ years of experience in data science and/or data engineering roles, including (Gen)AI-related work Proficiency with big-data tools (e.g., Spark, Hadoop) and modern data architectures Strong experience in ML Models with corresponding frameworks (e.g. sklearn, ..) and how to test and monitor these Experience with (Gen)AI, LLM frameworks (e.g. LangChain) and methods (e.g., Transformers, RLHF, fine-tuning) Strong programming skills (especially Python, SQL, and at least one additional language) Experienced in using visualization / dashboard frameworks from Python univers (e.g. streamlit, plotly, bookeh) Experience deploying (Gen)AI pipelines (prompt chains, embeddings, retrieval systems, vector databases) into production environments Familiarity with cloud (Gen)AI platforms (Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex AI) Experience with analytics or visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)

Qualifikationen - Bachelor’s degree (7+ years of experience), Master’s degree (5+ years of experience) or Ph.D. degree (0-2 years of experience) in life sciences, medicine, pharmacy, bioinformatics, biomedical/clinical data science or related field. - Solid scientific domain knowledge in late-stage pharmaceutical development, including Medical Affairs, Clinical Development, Pharmacovigilance, Health Economics & Outcomes Research (HEOR), or Epidemiology, shown through education or work experience. - Proficiency in Python is required and experience in front-end technologies (HTML, JavaScript, CSS, React) as well as basic working experience with Linux/Unix-based OS or Docker is a plus. - Competence in using GenAI models for knowledge extraction as well as basic understanding of agents and agentic workflows (MCP, A2A). - Experience in analyzing publications, especially literature, is essential. Ideally also experience with drug pipeline or trial CI databases (e.g. Clarivate’s Cortellis Competitive Intelligence, Citeline’s Trialtrove or Pharmaprojects). - Strong analytical skills to process, analyze, visualize, and present results to variety of audiences. Knowledge of common technologies and formats for retrieval, analysis and visualization of complex data. Experience using relational databases and SQL (Oracle, Apache Hadoop). - Systematic problem-solving mind, quick learner and superior attention to detail in developing tailored solutions, high degree of reliability and integrity. - Ability in working cross-functionally and in inter-disciplinary teams, while communicating effectively, both verbally and in writing, with scientists and non-scientists. Comfortable in a fast paced work environment with constantly shifting priorities. - Innate scientific curiosity, technical creativity, and innovative thinking. Motivated to break new ground in the field of information analysis and insights generation. - Excellent written and oral English language skills as well as the openness to travel (10%).

gliner_spans.text: Excellent written and oral English language skills
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: What You’ll Do As a Machine Learning Engineer III on the Routing Cost team, you will lead the design, development, and delivery of highly trafficked recommendation systems for our routing cost engine. Your technical contributions will include: Lead the engineering team(s) to execute end-to-end feature implementation within the larger navigation organization (~80 engineers). Design and build new ML and data pipelines, as well as optimizing existing ML and data pipelines. Build tools for automated quality assurance and data exploration. Leverage geospatial algorithms to optimize pipelines, as well as creating automated tuning and outlier detection algorithms. Partner with data scientists to make improvements to our models for determining patterns in movement and/or traffic. Mentor colleagues and participate in code and design reviews. Participate in an on-call rotation to ensure our systems remain available to customers 24/7. Team members alternate as the on-call primary responder, which may require immediate response outside normal working hours, including weekends. What We Believe Are Important Traits For This Role 8-10+ years of backend and ML experience: Extensive hands-on experience showcasing expertise and a strong track record in the engineering field. Technical knowledge: Extensive experience with Python, distributed processing pipelines (Hadoop, Spark, Airflow, Dask), and very large datasets – statistical analysis, data quality control, optimizing storage. Cloud proficiency: Extensive experience with cloud and infrastructure services, including, as well as deploying and managing infrastructure in cloud environments. Operational excellence: You drive a culture of quality and continuous improvement in your organization. Strong passion for clean code and robust architecture, with a drive to elevate engineering practices and design standards across the team. Ownership & execution: Own the technical vision, lead the strategy and guide the team to execute towards building the future of our routing cost engine. Customer focus: You care deeply about your customers and their problems, and you work tirelessly to innovate on their behalf. Growth mindset: Have the humility to accept mistakes, learn and grow from them. Mentorship: Experience mentoring and leading engineering teams developing skill sets and career growth. Strong written and vocal communication skills: You can talk and write about

DEIN PROFIL Begeisterung für Daten: Mit viel Begeisterung eignest du dir gerne neues Wissen zu Applikationen, Technologien und Tools im Analytics Kontext an. Bildung und Erfahrung: Du verfügst über ein abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik oder eine vergleichbare Ausbildung und idealerweise Praxiserfahrung im Consulting. Projektleitungskompetenz: Du hast ein hohes Eigenvertrauen in deine Fähigkeiten als Projektleitung, denkst kundenorientiert und begeisterst das Projektteam. Kommunikationsfähigkeiten: Durch deine Erfahrung und Persönlichkeit hast du Spaß an der Koordination komplexer Situationen und repräsentierst das Thema mit Begeisterung. Sprachkenntnisse: Deine sehr guten Deutsch- und guten Englischkenntnisse ermöglichen dir eine sichere Kommunikation.

Degree in Bio-Chemical Engineering or Natural Sciences (Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Chemistry, Physics, etc.) with strong data science experience Or a Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics or a related field 3+ years' experience in data analytics, ML/AI applications and process development in biotech or related industries Proven track record in managing complex, data-driven projects and cross-functional collaboration

Proven leadership experience with 3+ years managing machine learning or software engineering teams, ideally across multiple locations, with a track record of building high-performing teams Strategic technical vision with experience leading complex, multi-stakeholder ML/data science initiatives from concept to production Deep ML and cloud expertise including hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks, MLOps practices, and AWS cloud services Production ML deployment experience with real-world examples of deploying and maintaining large-scale ML systems in production environments Bridge-builder mindset with exceptional communication skills, ability to translate between technical and business stakeholders, and talent for building consensus across diverse teams Hands-on technical credibility with the ability to review architectures, guide technical decisions, and occasionally contribute to critical implementations

per_example.text: **Key Skills And Experience** You should have proven experience in conducting research, abilities to work hands-on to develop software, analyze computer systems, strong presentation and communication skills, courage to take initiative and to drive progress. Strong background in AI: Expertise in machine learning, deep learning, Gen AI. Systems experience: Distributed processing, storage solutions, edge systems, performance analysis, and workload orchestration Programming skills: Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python, R, Go, etc.) and familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, etc.), experience in Agentic AI and frameworks (AutoGen, LangChain, etc.) Excellent communication skills: Ability to clearly communicate research findings and technical concepts in written and oral presentations. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: Ability to identify and analyze complex problems, develop innovative solutions, and evaluate their effectiveness. Self-motivation and initiative: Ability to work independently and take ownership of research tasks. Published research in reputable conferences and journals demonstrating scholarly contribution.

gliner_spans.text: Ability to identify and analyze complex problems
gliner_spans.label: SKILL

per_example.text: Profil - Laufendes Studium z.B. eines MINT-Fachs oder Sportwissenschaften, gerne Data Science - Pflichtpraktikum mit Dauer von mindestens 18 Wochen - selbstständige und sorgfältige Arbeitsweise, technisches Verständnis - sehr gute Englischkenntnisse, Deutsch wünschenswert - Programmiererfahrung mit Python ist wünschenswert, aber nicht notwendig

Anforderungen Sie zeichnen sich durch detaillierte unternehmensspezifische Kenntnisse oder außergewöhnliche Spezialkenntnisse sowie Fähigkeiten aus: Maschinelles Lernen (Machine Learning), Statistische Modellierung, Teamführung und Mentoring Sehr gute Erfahrungen in klassischen und agilen Kooperationsformen Hervorragende Erfahrungen in der Leitung von strategisch ausgerichteten Projekten Sehr gute Kenntnisse in der Umsetzung von AI Use Cases Sehr gutes Technologieverständnis Tiefgehende, umfangreiche Erfahrung in der statistischen Analyse und statistischen Messungen Hervorragende Kenntnisse in der logischen Datenmodellierung Hervorragende Kenntnisse in komplexen Big Data Architekturen Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Deutsch (C1) und gute Kenntnisse in Englisch (min.B2)

per_example.text: An advanced degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related computationally focused science degree (or equivalent experience). You have 8+ years of relevant experience in software development or research work. Programming fluency in C/C++ with a deep understanding of algorithms and software development. A background that includes parallel programming, e.g., CUDA, OpenACC, OpenMP, MPI, pthreads, etc. Hands on experience doing low-level performance optimizations. In-depth expertise with CPU and GPU architecture fundamentals. Effective communication and organization skills, with a logical approach to problem solving, good time management, and prioritization skills. Expertise in parallelization and performance optimization of Deep Learning models arising from Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Recommender Systems, etc. Excellent understanding of linear algebra.

Bereiche, in denen wir Talente suchen: Softwareentwicklung : Entwurf, Implementierung und Wartung von Anwendungen, Systemen und Webplattformen für verschiedenste Anwendungen. Cloud Computing : Mitwirkung an der Entwicklung und Optimierung von Cloud-Infrastrukturen und -Diensten für skalierbare, flexible Lösungen. Künstliche Intelligenz und Machine Learning : Entwicklung intelligenter Systeme, die auf großen Datenmengen basieren, um innovative Lösungen zu schaffen. Cybersecurity : Arbeit an der Sicherstellung der IT-Sicherheit durch Entwicklung von Schutzsystemen und Identifizierung von Bedrohungen. Big Data und Data Science : Nutzung von Datenanalyse, Datenbanken und modernen Analysetools, um wertvolle Erkenntnisse zu gewinnen und Geschäftsprozesse zu optimieren. Mobile App-Entwicklung : Design und Entwicklung von benutzerfreundlichen und leistungsstarken Apps für Android und iOS. DevOps und IT-Infrastruktur : Mitwirkung an der Automatisierung und Optimierung von Softwarebereitstellung und Infrastrukturen. Agile Softwareentwicklung : Anwendung von agilen Methoden (wie Scrum oder Kanban) zur effizienten und flexiblen Entwicklung von Softwareprojekten. Wer wir suchen: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung oder Studium in einem relevanten Bereich (z.B. Informatik, Software Engineering, Wirtschaftsinformatik). Begeisterung für Technologie, Programmierung und die Entwicklung innovativer IT-Lösungen. Teamfähigkeit und eine lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise. Idealerweise Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung oder verwandten Bereichen, aber auch Quereinsteiger*innen mit entsprechenden Qualifikationen sind willkommen.

Abgeschlossenes Studium (Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Data Science o.ä.) oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation mit mehrjähriger Berufserfahrung im relevanten Umfeld (z.B. als IT-Consultant, Software Engineer, Data Scientist). Verfügst über ein abgeschlossenes Studium (Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Data Science o.ä.) oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation mit mehrjähriger Berufserfahrung im relevanten Umfeld (z.B. als IT-Consultant, Software Engineer, Data Scientist). Verstehst die Schnittstelle zwischen IT und Business und kannst sowohl technische Tiefe als auch prozessuales Verständnis vermitteln. Bringt idealerweise Erfahrung im Mentoring, Coaching oder der Ausbildung von Nachwuchskräften mit und hast Spaß an pädagogischen Fragestellungen. Besitzt idealerweise bereits einen AdA-Schein (Ausbildereignung nach AEVO) oder bist bereit, diesen zeitnah zu erwerben. Bist vertraut mit modernen Tech-Stacks und Methoden (z.B. Python, SQL, Cloud-Services, agile Methoden) und hast eine Affinität zu aktuellen Entwicklungen wie z.B. KI. Dank Deiner analytischen Denkfähigkeit und Deines "Growth Mindsets" treibst Du proaktiv die Entwicklung der Studierenden voran und ermutigst sie, die Komfortzone zu verlassen. Bist ein/e Teamplayer/in, der/die standortübergreifende Zusammenarbeit schätzt. Sprichst fließend Englisch und Deutsch und verfügst über ausgezeichnete kommunikative Fähigkeiten, um komplexe technische Zusammenhänge verständlich zu vermitteln und Stakeholder zu begeistern.

Here are the extracted requirements: 4+ years of professional experience in software quality assurance or engineering, with a strong focus on scalable web applications (7+years for Sr. QA Engineer). Strong grasp of QA architecture and modern testing methodologies. Deep expertise in the tech stack used by our engineers, specifically TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, and PySpark. Cloud & Database Proficiency: Familiarity with AWS services and both SQL and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB) databases to effectively test data persistence and performance. Global Collaboration: Ability to work effectively with globally distributed teams Native or Business-level proficiency in written and spoken English Strong plus if you also have: AI/ML Literacy: Understanding of Machine Learning (Supervised/Reinforcement Learning), Predictive AI, and the validation of Data Pipelines. Proficiency in Python or experience with PySpark. Prior experience in the e-commerce or Ad Tech ecosystem (DSPs, Audience Data, Fraud detection).

Your Profile Master’s degree in computer science, data engineering, mathematics or a related field 5+ years of experience in data science and/or data engineering roles, including (Gen)AI-related work Proficiency with big-data tools (e.g., Spark, Hadoop) and modern data architectures Strong experience in ML Models with corresponding frameworks (e.g. sklearn, ..) and how to test and monitor these Experience with (Gen)AI, LLM frameworks (e.g. LangChain) and methods (e.g., Transformers, RLHF, fine-tuning) Strong programming skills (especially Python, SQL, and at least one additional language) Experienced in using visualization / dashboard frameworks from Python univers (e.g. streamlit, plotly, bookeh) Experience deploying (Gen)AI pipelines (prompt chains, embeddings, retrieval systems, vector databases) into production environments Familiarity with cloud (Gen)AI platforms (Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex AI) Experience with analytics or visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau)
